reasoning: Sector data from 2026-03-06 close shows mixed rotation with slight risk-off tilt. XLK (tech) -0.38% and XLE (energy) -1.01% represent weakness in growth and cyclicals; XLF (financials) +0.26% shows resilience but insufficient to offset the tech pullback. SPY flat at -0.15% suggests the market is absorbing the sector weakness without conviction. Rising VIX (+4.47%) reinforces the cautious tone. No single sector is moving >0.5%, so this is a low-confidence, mixed signal leaning marginally defensive.
